formInstance.inputDocument: Artist Cruz Vega respectfully submits "Urban Oasis" for consideration in your esteemed art exhibition. Communicating via vega.cruz2001@mailinator.com, Cruz Vega offers a piece crafted in the medium of Photography. The artwork, with dimensions of 80 x 60 x 2 cm, was created in 2024. The Artwork Description reads: "This photograph shows a small, hidden garden in the heart of a bustling city. Amidst the concrete buildings, the garden is a haven of greenery. Colorful flowers bloom in neatly arranged beds, and a small, trickling fountain provides a soothing sound. The contrast between the urban landscape in the background and the peaceful garden in the foreground highlights the preciousness of these oases in the city." Cruz Vega has expressed a Preferred Exhibition Period of Spring 2024 and confirms that "Urban Oasis" is available for sale.
